events.name: Josh Johnson — Comedy Band Camp Tour
events.outcome: General onsale went live. Canada presale code THISONETIME confirmed working. Multi-night runs at theaters. Previous tour sold out entirely.
events.notes: Watch for secondary pricing data in coming days. Ryman Nashville Sep 26 is the key date.

events.name: Alex Warren — 2026 Tour
events.outcome: Artist presale with code AWFORD went live 3/5. Red Rocks secondary already $223 get-in before general onsale.
events.notes: Red Rocks pricing confirms high demand. 54M monthly Spotify listeners.

events.name: Metallica — Life Burns Faster at the Sphere
events.outcome: General onsale 3/6. Legacy/Fifth Member presales sold through. Added more dates due to demand. SiriusXM presale ran 3/5.
events.notes: 8 Sphere dates. Halloween Oct 31 = highest premium. Added dates = confirmed demand signal.

events.name: Sting — 3.0 Tour
events.outcome: General onsale 3/6. Fan club and LiveNation presales completed. 12 new fall dates including 6-night Brooklyn Paramount residency.
events.notes: Brooklyn Paramount ~2K cap = extremely limited supply. Montreal = sentimental return to first Police venue.

events.name: Joji — SOLARIS World Tour
events.outcome: General onsale 3/6. Citi presale completed. 18 arena dates.
events.notes: SLC smallest market. Arena tour supporting new album.

events.name: Jason Aldean — Songs About Us Tour
events.outcome: General onsale 3/6. Aldean Army fan club presale completed. 22 amphitheater dates.
events.notes: New album Apr 24. Small-market amphitheater dates = best margins.

events.name: Killswitch Engage — Summer 2026 Tour
events.outcome: Artist presale ran 3/3. Code BBMKSETHISCON2026 confirmed working. With Machine Head. 16 dates Jun 3-27.
events.notes: Metal theater dates. Fillmore-sized venues. Genre crossover audience.
